items.content_html: 📃 • updated list of community themes & plugins for obsidian.md!
items.title: konhi/obsidian-community-list: 📃 • updated list of community themes & plugins for obsidian.md!

items.content_html: A fully featured replacement for the built-in daily notes plugin. Obligator functions like a virtual bullet journal by copying over unchecked to-do items to your new daily note, along with adding any scheduled items you've set up
items.title: Newbrict/obsidian-obligator: A fully featured replacement for the built-in daily notes plugin. Obligator functions like a virtual bullet journal by copying over unchecked to-do items to your new daily note, along with adding any scheduled items you've set up

items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin to style text in quotation marks.
items.title: DrakeRichards/quote-styler: An Obsidian.md plugin to style text in quotation marks.

items.content_html: Obsidian plugin that adds a stopwatch whose value can be pasted into the editor
items.title: hedgehog1833/obsidian-timetracker: Obsidian plugin that adds a stopwatch whose value can be pasted into the editor
mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin

items.content_html: Plugin for Obsidian that allows user to add properties to multiple notes at once.
items.title: fez-github/obsidian-multi-properties: Plugin for Obsidian that allows user to add properties to multiple notes at once.

items.content_html: languagetool plugin for obsidian
items.title: Clemens-E/obsidian-languagetool-plugin: languagetool plugin for obsidian

items.content_html: Privacy Glasses plugin for Obsidian. Preserve your privacy while working in public!
items.title: jillalberts/privacy-glasses: Privacy Glasses plugin for Obsidian. Preserve your privacy while working in public!

items.content_html: This is an Obsidian plugin that works as a simple planner for personal use.
items.title: pjkaufman/obsidian-simple-planner: This is an Obsidian plugin that works as a simple planner for personal use.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.
items.title: mProjectsCode/obsidian-meta-bind-plugin: A plugin for Obsidian that can create input fields inside your notes and bind them to metadata fields.

items.content_html: A plugin tracks occurrences and numbers in your notes

items.content_html: A plugin that can query multiple APIs for movies, series, anime, games, music and wiki articles, and import them into your vault.

ezhov-da/obsidian-time-tracker-template-builder-plugin

items.content_html: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).
items.title: nhaouari/obsidian-textgenerator-plugin: Text generator is a handy plugin for Obsidian that helps you generate text content using GPT-3 (OpenAI).

items.title: conneroisu/sugar-rush: Obsidian Plugin for Oil/Vinegar Like Navigation within an Obsidian Vault.

items.content_html: Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.
items.title: daeh/zotero-markdb-connect: Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.

items.content_html: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds additional `x-callback-url` endpoints to the app for common actions — it's a clean, super-charged addition to Obsidian URI.
items.title: czottmann/obsidian-actions-uri: A plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md) that adds additional `x-callback-url` endpoints to the app for common actions — it's a clean, super-charged addition to Obsidian URI.

items.content_html: An obsidian plugin for managing a todo list as part of your daily note. Includes features such as carry incomplete items forward to the next day.
items.title: thomasbrezinski/obsidian-nested-daily-todos: An obsidian plugin for managing a todo list as part of your daily note. Includes features such as carry incomplete items forward to the next day.
